name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, compliance oversight causes legal penalties. We automate compliance checklist creation instead of manual checklist creation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in maintaining up-to-date compliance checklists and reports.
